rows: The vowels are written first in the alphabet
Practice writing अ आ इ ई

title: Sanskrit Alphabets – Devanagari Alphabets

url: Vowels, Consonants in Sanskrit and their pronunciation

rows: Velar क ख ग घ ङ
Palatal च छ ज झ ञ
Retroflex ट ठ ड ढ ण
Dental त थ द ध न
Labial प फ ब भ म
Clear retroflex vs dental: ट त

title: Vowels, Consonants in Sanskrit and their pronunciation

url: Sanskrit Barakhadi: Symbols for vowels with consonants

rows: Each consonant has twelve forms with vowels
Write from memory: च चा चि...

title: Sanskrit Barakhadi: Symbols for vowels with consonants

url: Frequently faced pronunciation problems in Sanskrit (Devanagari)

rows: Aspiration: kh is not k+h together
Do not confuse श (palatal) and ष (retroflex)
Visargaḥ sounds like echo of preceding vowel
Anusvāra follows vowel in same syllable
Avoid English r for Sanskrit र
Practice minimal pairs: प फ, ब भ
Stress is usually on first long syllable
Clear articulation is more important than speed

title: Frequently faced pronunciation problems in Sanskrit (Devanagari)

url: Pronunciation of Anusvar (अनुस्वार) in Sanskrit

rows: Anusvāra (ं) is nasalization of the class
Before क ख ग घ → ङ् sound
Before च छ ज झ → ञ् sound
Before ट ठ ड ढ → ण् sound
Before त थ द ध → न् sound
Before प फ ब भ → म् sound
Sometimes written as bindu in manuscripts
Contrast: अं vs अन् at word end
Do not drop the nasal completely
Listen to verse recitation for models

title: Pronunciation of Anusvar (अनुस्वार) in Sanskrit

url: Combining consonants in Sanskrit (संस्कृत जोडाक्षरे)

rows: Conjunct letters join consonants without intervening vowel
Split conjuncts left to right when reading

title: Combining consonants in Sanskrit (संस्कृत जोडाक्षरे)

url: Combining consonants with र (r) – Sanskrit जोडाक्षरे Part 2

rows: र् combines forward: प्र, त्र, क्र
When र is first: र्क र्ग (rka, rga)
Do not pronounce extra vowel after र्
र् पश्चात् अतिरिक्तं स्वरं मा कुरुत
Contrast: र vs ड़ (Hindi) — Sanskrit uses र only

title: Combining consonants with र (r) – Sanskrit जोडाक्षरे Part 2

url: Combining consonants with ह (h) – Sanskrit जोडाक्षरे Part 3

rows: ह् combines: ख, थ, फ + ह
ह at end of word is light

title: Combining consonants with ह (h) – Sanskrit जोडाक्षरे Part 3

Consult a teacher for regional variants

url: Sentence using "If-Then" in Sanskrit

rows: If you come, we go together
यदि त्वम् आगच्छसि तर्हि सह गच्छामः
yadi tvam āgacchasi tarhi saha gacchāmaḥ
यदि सः अधीयते तर्हि सः उत्तीर्णः भवति
yadi saḥ adhīyate tarhi saḥ uttīrṇaḥ bhavati
If she calls, tell her I am busy
यदि सा आह्वयति तर्हि तस्यै वद — व्यस्तः अस्मि
yadi sā āhvayati tarhi tasyai vada — vyastaḥ asmi
If we leave now, we are on time
यदि अधुना गच्छामः तर्हि समये भवामः
yadi adhunā gacchāmaḥ tarhi samaye bhavāmaḥ
If the cart is late, take another
यदि शकटः दीर्घायुषः तर्हि अन्यत् गृहाण
yadi śakaṭaḥ dīrghāyuṣḥ tarhi anyat gṛhāṇa
If help is needed, ask me
यदि साहाय्यम् आवश्यकम् तर्हि माम् पृच्छ
yadi sāhāyyam āvaśyakam tarhi mām pṛccha
If I had money, I would buy a house
यदि मे धनम् अभविष्यत् तर्हि गृहं क्रीणीयम्
yadi me dhanam abhaviṣyat tarhi gṛhaṃ krīṇīyam
यदि ते सम्मन्यन्ते तर्हि कार्यं आरभत
yadi te sammanyante tarhi kāryam ārabhata
If you eat too much, you fall ill
यदि अतिभोजनं करोषि तर्हि रोगी भवसि
yadi atibhojanaṃ karoṣi tarhi rogī bhavasi
If the road is bad, go slowly
यदि मार्गः दुष्टः तर्हि शनैः गच्छ
yadi mārgaḥ duṣṭaḥ tarhi śanaiḥ gaccha
If winter comes, wear warm clothes
यदि शिशिरः आगच्छति तर्हि उष्णानि वस्त्राणि धारय
yadi śiśiraḥ āgacchati tarhi uṣṇāni vastrāṇi dhāraya
यदि अनृतं वदसि तर्हि कोऽपि न विश्वसति
yadi anṛtaṃ vadasi tarhi ko'pi na viśvasati
If I see him, I inform you
यदि तम् पश्यामि तर्हि तुभ्यं निवेदयामि
yadi tam paśyāmi tarhi tubhyaṃ nivedayāmi

title: Sentence using "If-Then" in Sanskrit

url: Which-That / What-That sentences in Sanskrit

rows: The book that I bought is good
यत् पुस्तकं क्रीणामि तत् शिष्टम् अस्ति
yat pustakaṃ krīṇāmi tat śiṣṭam asti
The man who came is my uncle
यः आगच्छत् सः मम पितुः भ्राता
yaḥ āgacchat saḥ mama pituḥ bhrātā
कुत्र सः वसति इति अहं जानामि
kutra saḥ vasati iti ahaṃ jānāmi
That is the house I want
The girl whose bag this is stood
This is the road to the temple
I like the song she sang
या गीतं गायति सा मे रोचते
yā gītaṃ gāyati sā me rocate
The reason why he left is unclear
That is not what I meant
यत् अहं अभिप्रैमि तत् न एतत्
yat ahaṃ abhipraimi tat na etat

title: Which-That / What-That sentences in Sanskrit

url: Sentences using "If-Then" Style 2 in Sanskrit

rows: If you hurry, you catch the chariot
यदि शीघ्रं गच्छसि तर्हि रथं गृह्णासि
yadi śīghraṃ gacchasi tarhi rathaṃ gṛhṇāsi
If I were rich, I would help
यदि धनवान् अभविष्यम् अहं साहाय्यं कुर्याम्
yadi dhanavān abhaviṣyam ahaṃ sāhāyyaṃ kuryām
Unless you try, you will not learn
यदि न यतसे तर्हि न अधीषे
yadi na yatase tarhi na adhīṣe
If it had rained, crops would have grown
If she had called, I would have come
If they agree, deal is fixed
यदि ते सम्मन्यन्ते तर्हि सौदः निश्चितः
yadi te sammanyante tarhi saudaḥ niścitaḥ
If not today, tomorrow for sure
यदि विद्युत् चमत्करोति तर्हि अन्तः स्थीयताम्
yadi vidyut camatkaroti tarhi antaḥ sthīyatām
